case_title: WAUGH, SHARON VS CITY & COUNTY OF SF, PARK & RECREATION

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAUGH, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF, PARK & RECREATION $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $270.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CERT. RECEIPT TO TIMOTHY ARMISTEAD (BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION) RETURNED SIGNED.
